data.current_description: Retrieve a specific vehicle by VIN
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific vehicle from inventory using its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN). Returns the complete vehicle object including make, model, year, pricing, and availability status. Use this operation to look up individual vehicles by their unique VIN identifier.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks important context. The improved description clarifies what the VIN parameter represents, specifies what vehicle data is returned (referencing the Vehicle schema properties), and explains the use case for AI agents. message: Operation 'post-ailm-contact' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The description lacks clarity about what contact information is expected as input, what the response contains, and explicitly states what does NOT happen (no message queuing). Added details about input expectations, response format, and the specific side effect of NOT triggering engagement workflows to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this versus the engage endpoint.

data.current_description: Create or update a contact in the system without queuing engagement messages
data.description_suggestion: Create or update a contact in the system without queuing engagement messages. Accepts contact information and returns the created or updated contact object. This operation does not trigger any automated engagement workflows or message queues, making it suitable for contact data synchronization without immediate outreach.
data.reasoning: The description lacks clarity about what contact information is expected as input, what the response contains, and explicitly states what does NOT happen (no message queuing). Added details about input expectations, response format, and the specific side effect of NOT triggering engagement workflows to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this versus the engage endpoint.

data.current_description: Create or update a contact and queue engagement messages
data.description_suggestion: Create or update a contact and queue engagement messages for delivery. Accepts contact information and returns the created or updated contact object along with queued engagement message details. This operation triggers automated engagement workflows and message queuing, initiating outreach to the contact based on configured engagement rules.
data.reasoning: The description is incomplete regarding input/output details and side effects.
